title: My Rock

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: To you I call, my steadfast stone
Don't turn away and leave me alone
In silence deep as ancient graves
Hear my voice, my soul to save

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: With lifted hands toward your holy place
I plead for mercy, seek your face
Don't count me with the wicked ones
Who speak of peace but harbor storms

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The Lord, my strength, my shield divine
In Him I trust, His light will shine
My heart leaps up with joyful song
My help forever, my shield strong
(My help forever, my shield strong)

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: According to their evil ways
Let justice flow through darkened days
They scorn the works of mighty hands
Their castles built on shifting sands

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Blessed be the Lord who heard my plea
His strength flows down and sets me free
Defender of the anointed one
Until the final day is done

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Save your people, bless your own
Shepherd them through paths unknown
Lift them up through endless days
'Til every voice rings out with praise

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The Lord, my strength, my shield divine
In Him I trust, His light will shine
My heart leaps up with joyful song
My help forever, my shield strong

sections.label: Outro
lines: My strength, my shield divine
In You I trust, Your light will shine

epigraph: The LORD is my strength and my shield
